## Checklist
- [ ] Issue title and PR title follow project naming convention.
- [ ] Linked issue(s) and workflow docs are updated.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are covered.
- [ ] No business logic leaked outside domain/application boundaries.
- [ ] Required tests were added/updated and passed.
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data included.
